3309780.name: Temporis Arts Soundtrack
3309780.description:
We've collected all the songs from Temporis Arts v2.0 in-game! The number is over 60.

Exception License Clause: Only for those who purchased this soundtrack, the track can be used for other custom pattern rhythm games!

Temporis Arts In Memorial - a folder containing basic songs and memorabilia songs. (45 songs)

Temporis Arts in Chronos Altar - Included are songs that have been added since the altar of time! Some spoilers are included. (21 songs)
